---
title: "Z Skigen"
pagetitle: "ZS"
subtitle: "Statistics & Data Science at Pomona College"
image: images/z_phillies_glasses.jpeg
image-alt: "Z Skigen at a Philadelphia Phillies press conference"
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zskigen/
    - icon: github
      aria-label: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/zskigen
    - icon: envelope
      aria-label: "Email"
      href: mailto:zbso2022@mymail.pomona.edu
page-layout: full
---

<br><br>

::: {#hero-heading}
I am a statistician, baseball analyst, and data scientist with a passion for turning complex problems into actionable insight. My **research** applies Bayesian causal inference to questions of transportability — asking when and how findings from one population can inform another. My **baseball** work spans player evaluation, ABS challenge modeling, and building data infrastructure for front offices and college programs alike.

[Learn more about me →](/about){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
